stemHtml: Weather conditions in a control zone fall below the VMC minima. What is the appropriate course of action by the control tower?

options.a: VFR flights not permitted but local flights may depart.
options.b: Control unit should decide if traffic may be permitted as control tower may not decide.
options.c: Close control zone and get the VFR traffic clear.
options.d: Talk to incoming VFR traffic about it and call back the VFR traffic on the ground.
